title: HSBC Faces Earnings Test After Stock Rallies 89% From Low
description: HSBC Holdings Plc’s earnings Wednesday come with revenue prospects and the buyout of a subsidiary in focus, as the shares hover around a record high.
content: HSBC Holdings Plc’s earnings Wednesday come with revenue prospects and the buyout of a subsidiary in focus, as the shares hover around a record high.
